refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Operational availability depends on both minimizing failure occurrences and reducing repair times. Decomposing availability into fault management and recovery functions allows targeted design parameters.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period; verify that availability metric meets or exceeds target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system failure occurrences during operation.
FR2: Enable rapid detection and recovery from system faults.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust fault-tolerant hardware and software design to reduce failure rates.
DP2: Integrate real-time fault detection and automated recovery mechanisms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both failure prevention and recovery for availability.

potential_sources: Fault detection tightly coupled with recovery mechanisms.
Hardware robustness impacts fault occurrence and recovery complexity.
coupling_check.notes: The two DPs are logically coupled but can be modularized to minimize cross-dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes fault detection algorithms can reliably identify failures in real time.
Risk that hardware robustness improvements may increase cost or weight.
Recovery automation depends on reliable telemetry and control interfaces.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider further decomposition if recovery mechanisms become complex or if fault types vary significantly.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level responsibility for availability, integrating hardware robustness and fault management.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for real-time fault data collection and status reporting.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands that may affect system availability.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts related to system faults impacting safety and availability.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for remote monitoring and teleoperation affecting availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains hardware components but limited fault management logic.
Supports remote control but not primary availability management.
Handles safety alerts but not full availability responsibility.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Availability management is best contained within the NGHE Solution module to centralize fault tolerance and recovery logic, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity concentration in NGHE Solution module.
Risk of interface overload with multiple external interfaces.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth; consider splitting availability functions into submodules if diffusion increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping to fault prevention and recovery.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists if fault detection and recovery logic are not well modularized within NGHE Solution.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the best module to own availability functions.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified at the NGHE Solution level through operational metrics and telemetry data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability responsibility to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Consider further decomposition of availability functions if complexity or diffusion increases.
Ensure interfaces are well defined to avoid overload.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently captures the availability requirement with clear FRs, DPs, and IM assignment. Verification and ownership are well defined with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system failure occurrences during operation.
FR2: Enable rapid detection and recovery from system faults.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level if desired.

assumptions: Hardware robustness improvements are feasible within constraints.
open_risks: Complexity concentration in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Operational availability data from prototype or simulation.
Fault detection and recovery performance metrics.
